{{Quote|I will not surrender, lovely little Jedi. Rather, ''you'' will surrender to ''me''. Feel my essence slip into your senses…there is no anger. There is no hate. Only '''love'''. Only '''desire'''.|Zenex|<ref name="Republic 49">[[Republic 49|''Republic'' 49]]</ref>}}
'''Zenex''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] who worked as a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] on [[The Wheel/Legends|''The Wheel'']] [[Space station/Legends|space station]], and was secretly in league with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
[[File:MissiontotheWheel.jpg|thumb|left|Zenex is killed by Aayla Secura.]]
When [[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]] stole a data chip containing the CIS plans to attack [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] from him, he ordered the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Grakko]] to find and kill her. Grakko was unsuccessful, and the remains of his body were later found by Zenex and his men. In order to ensure that the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] would be able to successfully defend Kamino, [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] set up a meeting between Zenex and Khaleen, where Khaleen would give Zenex back the data chip, under the watchful eye of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] Vos and [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]]. The plan appeared to be going well, until Zenex killed his own henchmen with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and tried to use his species' powerful [[Pheromone/Legends|pheromones]] to make Khaleen kill herself. Quinlan Vos saved her, but almost died when Zenex attempted to push him off the bridge they were standing on. Aayla Secura saved the data chip, but before she could do anything else, Zenex began using his pheromones on her. Aayla, with the help of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], was able to resist, and killed Zenex with her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].
